entry.title: Re: Questions about bank charge contribution codes
entry.content:
Hello Santosh

I'm sorry, I mistook the application name.
The correct app name is "Create Supplier Invoice". Thank you.

entry.title: Sloc to Sloc Material Request with Documentation and Without Consumption/Movement
entry.content:
Hi all,

Is there a transaction that can be used to request material to be transferred from storage location to storage location (for production order) that produces documentation and does not immediately consume/move material from the storage location it is requested from?

entry.title: Re: 建立供應商發票時進項稅額是否可以按明細呈現？
entry.content: We helped you to accept the answer, since there were no updates after 7 days. You can unaccept it anytime if you have further questions.

entry.title: Re: Application Decisions for HR Payroll

Hi Karthik,

I'm not sure if I understood your question completely, but standard integration per ALE still works as before between stand-alone H4S4 and core S/4HANA system, so no need to build a custom integration. 

Best regards, Michael

Thanks and regards
Sunil Kumar Padhy

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors Timetracking integration with SAP S/4H...
entry.content:
Hello Saumi

we provide an integration to the S/4 private cloud time sheet as you might know.

Public cloud is being assessed, but I don´t see a solution in the short term. But that´s rather a topic for the S/4 public cloud guys as for Successfactors.

Best regards

Volker

entry.title: Inquiry on Linkage Between "Activate Advanced Valuation" and "Define Alternative Reconciliation"
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I hope this message finds you well.

I'm currently working on configuring SAP and have come across two specific areas that I need some clarification on:

  1. 103315_Activate Advanced Valuation – I understand this configuration is related to handling of complex valuation scenarios like Balance Sheet Reclassification, Impairment, Foreign Currency Valuations and Discounting of Receivables and Payables.

  2. 102631_Define Alternative Reconciliation – This configuration seems to pertain to setting up alternative reconciliation methods by assigning an alternative reconciliation account if we want to reconcile some transactions differently from the normal business.

My question is whether these two configurations are interconnected or if they operate independently. Specifically:

  • Are there any dependencies between "Activate Advanced Valuation" and "Define Alternative Reconciliation"?
  • Could changes or settings in one configuration impact the other?
  • Are there best practices or considerations when configuring these two areas together?

To share an example: I have assigned an alternative reconciliation account to the target account mentioned in the Advanced Valuation configuration, but the document is still being posted to the target account specified when I am running the general ledger job for post-balance sheet reclassification. I am attaching some screenshots to illustrate the issue:

Any insights or experiences you can share would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your help!

Best regards,
CA Amar Modanwal.

entry.title: Re: SAP Signavio Process Accelerator VS other SAP Info So...
entry.content:
Hi @Katharina_PW 

Thanks so much for the response, I appreciated it! 

Yes, I will participate in the webinar, looking forward and will take a look at Learning Hub as well!

Kind Regards

JD

entry.title: Re: Converting file from CRLF to LF in SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
hello All,

We have acheived this by writing a simple groovy to replace \r in file and this gave the intended result.

entry.title: Re: Duplicate Inspection lot creation on Sales Return Ins...

entry.title: Re: SAP RAP: Action with additional Pop-Up
entry.content:
Hi @lars_kr,

You can use the local annotation below to mark an action as critical, which will trigger a confirmation popup when executed.

<Annotations Target="GWSAMPLE_BASIC.GWSAMPLE_BASIC_Entities/RegenerateAllData">
        <Annotation Term="com.sap.vocabularies.Common.v1.IsActionCritical" Bool="true"/>
</Annotations>

https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/topic/87130de10c8a44269c605b0322df6b1a

You can overwrite the default message using i18n extension with the following key:

C_OPERATIONS_ACTION_CONFIRM_MESSAGE

https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/topic/b8cb649973534f08a6047692f8c6830d

entry.title: Re: Troubleshooting Business Partner Key Mapping Issues
entry.content: 😉thanx - very very useful!!

entry.title: Re: SAP IAS User store

entry.title: Re: Decision Key Not showing In My Inbox after Re-work Pu...

The issue pop-up due to wrong "Activity ID" configured, Issue resolved.....

entry.title: Re: Task 1 - Create CDS View Entity ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content:
Task 1 completed!

entry.title: Re: How to send SAP data to Advanced Event Mesh in 15 minutes, code-less
entry.content: Thank you Benedikt!

entry.title: Re: SAP IAS User store
entry.content: It seems shift <enter> doesn’t work for new lines, instead posts. Please accept my apologies for these multiple comments. I think the SAP approach would be Identity Access Governance (acting somewhat like the on prem GRC/AC except for cloud users) interacting with CIS and then end instances. This approach will work for BTP Services and I think the different SaaS offerings SAP brings. I’m unclear if there are competing products from other companies in this space; I understand the SCIM protocol is being widely used in this larger “cloud user” topic. Hope this comment helps; also hope someone in the community who is an expert or more advanced than me can see this thread and respond.

entry.title: GRC integration with OKTA for user data source
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have a Okta server where our client store user information, whenever any user join's the organization his/her data is stored in okta and samaccount/email is created for users.

As you must be knowing OKTA is a identity solution where user details are stored, we want to use OKTA as users data source.

We want to understand if GRC support OKTA tool as a part of integration or not.

If GRC doesn't support OKTA then can we integrate OKTA with IAG using IAS/IPS then we can use IAG as a bridge with GRC where we want user's data along with manger/supervisor.

We are also using OKTA as Corporate Idp via SAP IAS. for SSO for all system like SAC, IBP, S4, BTP etc

Please provide the solution for above scenarios how we can integrate OKTA with GRC or IAG.

Regards,
Surya Pratap Singh

entry.title: Re: How to influence pptx filename on SEN playback?
entry.content: Thanks Shane!

entry.title: Re: First AI Project AI Core: Execution does not write Log
entry.content: Im running into the same issue whenever try testing one of my configurations. Clicking the default resource group inside of launchpad doesn't do anything for me sadly and Logs only appear after waiting atleast an hour. I tried using the api calls directly with postman and realised that the api call to get the logs for an execution does not require a resource group so it doesnt seem to have an impact anyways even if you add it to the api call. btw. using the API directly to print logs doesn't work for any execution which is odd. The only way to get logs rn is to wait for ai launchpad to display them. I might also try to use the ai core sdk to get logs just to make sure. This seems like an ai core bug to me though.

entry.title: Re: End-to-End Visual Inspection Process in SAP Digital Manufacturing
entry.content:
Hi jianghan-chang,

I am getting an XML view error on these two screens(Manage Visual Inspections and Manage Visual Inspection Views). Are the screens being developed? Why do you think they are not opening?

Regards,
Ömer Faruk

entry.title: Re: Shared Memory Objects - Transfer data between ABAP programs
entry.content: Hi, Thank you for sharing this simple, yet detailed example. It gave me great insights. However, I have a very logical question here: In case we are importing/exporting large tables, structures, deep structures, etc. to the memory, then this approach looks fine. But, when we are doing something as simple as one variable value (let's say a flag boolean), then is it really worth writing and maintaining so much code and so many objects when this can be achieved simply in 2 lines -- IMPORT and EXPORT...??? Looking for logical and practical explanation. 'Because SAP recommends this', 'Performance is better', is not logical enough for me. If performance is better I would appreciate knowing how this method improves performance? Thanks in advance!

entry.title: ABAP download files via saprouter
entry.content:
Hi all, 

I cannot find much information on the topic. I want my ABAP program to download a file from the internet, but the server does not have internet access, except via the saprouter.

Do I have to make a connecton in SM59, and use it somehow in ABAP? (smth. like SAP-SUPPORT_NOTE_DOWNLOAD)
Or set up a proxy, so that ABAP functions can use the HTTP proxy?
Or something else?

Regards, Ilian

entry.title: How to build wrapper RAP API to call 2 standard API's
entry.content:
I have a requirement to create equipment in SAP, where the data comes from a 3rd-party system external to SAP. After the equipment is created, we need to create a maintenance order.

To create equipment, the API - API_EQUIPMENT is available.
To create a maintenance order, the API - API_MAINTENANCEORDER_0002 is available.

In my scenario, I need to call the maintenance order API after the equipment is created using the Equipment API. Is it possible to call the maintenance order API upon the successful execution of the Equipment API using RAP?

entry.title: Re: Connecting SAP IAS as a proxy to Azure AD using OpenID Connect
entry.content:
Hi @Colt 

Thank you for the blog. In the scenario where IAS is used as a proxy and Azure AD as the identity provider, what are the best practices? Should users from Azure AD be present in the IAS User Store? For example, should users from Azure AD first be provisioned in the IAS User Store (i.e., stored there) and only then be provisioned to applications like SAC, or is it better to provision users directly to SAC through IAS as a proxy without storing them in the IAS User Store?

I’m still unclear about what the best practices are in this situation.

Thank you!

entry.title: RAP Application Previewing Error in VSCode: Cannot find module 'keytar', Cannot find module 'vscode'
entry.content:
Hi,

We are facing the below error while previewing the RAP Application using VS Code.
Please help!

PS C:\Users\SSharma\Fiori Projects\fi_rap> npm run start

 

> fi_rap@0.0.1 start

> fiori run --open "test/flpSandbox.html?sap-client=800&sap-ui-xx-viewCache=false#firap-tile"

 

info fiori-tools-proxy Using UI5 version 1.102.2 based on manifest.json

info fiori-tools-proxy Starting fiori-tools-proxy using following configuration:

info fiori-tools-proxy proxy: 'undefined'

info fiori-tools-proxy ignoreCertError: 'false'

info fiori-tools-proxy backend: [{"path":"/sap","url":"http://url.com:8000","client":"800"}]

info fiori-tools-proxy ui5: [{"path":"/resources","url":"https://ui5.sap.com","version":"1.102.2"},{"path":"/test-resources","url":"https://ui5.sap.com","version":"1.102.2"}]

info fiori-tools-proxy debug: 'false'

warn backend-proxy-middleware Cannot find module 'keytar'

warn backend-proxy-middleware Require stack:

warn backend-proxy-middleware - C:\Users\SSharma\Fiori Projects\fi_rap\node_modules\@sap\ux-ui5-tooling\dist\middlewares\fiori-tools-proxy.js

warn backend-proxy-middleware Could not "require('keytar')". Trying VSCode's copy

warn backend-proxy-middleware Cannot find module 'vscode'

warn backend-proxy-middleware Require stack:

warn backend-proxy-middleware - C:\Users\SSharma\Fiori Projects\fi_rap\node_modules\@sap\ux-ui5-tooling\dist\middlewares\fiori-tools-proxy.js

warn backend-proxy-middleware Could not get hold of vscode

warn backend-proxy-middleware Dummy store. Trying to retrieve for service: fiori/v2/system, key: http://url:8000/800

warn backend-proxy-middleware Cannot find module 'keytar'

warn backend-proxy-middleware Require stack:

warn backend-proxy-middleware - C:\Users\SSharma\Fiori Projects\fi_rap\node_modules\@sap\ux-ui5-tooling\dist\middlewares\fiori-tools-proxy.js

warn backend-proxy-middleware Could not "require('keytar')". Trying VSCode's copy

warn backend-proxy-middleware Cannot find module 'vscode'

warn backend-proxy-middleware Require stack:

warn backend-proxy-middleware - C:\Users\SSharma\Fiori Projects\fi_rap\node_modules\@sap\ux-ui5-tooling\dist\middlewares\fiori-tools-proxy.js

warn backend-proxy-middleware Could not get hold of vscode

warn backend-proxy-middleware Dummy store. Trying to retrieve for service: fiori/v2/system, key: http://url:8000/800

info backend-proxy-middleware Backend proxy created for http://url:8000 /sap

info fiori-tools-appreload Livereload middleware started for port 35729 and path C:\Users\SSharma\Fiori Projects\fi_rap\webapp

info fiori-tools-preview Initialized for app firap

 

⚠️  Process Failed With Error

 

Error Message:

 

 

For details, execute the same command again with an additional '--verbose' parameter

entry.title: Re: Sales Order and SAP BTP Use Case with SAP Build Apps,...
entry.content:
Hi Tom,

before starting with development I would suggest that you check that the API_SALES_ORDER_SRV provides you the needed data. So activate the service in your S/4HANA System and try to consume it directly with Postman or REST Client (which I'm a big fan of). I think your entrypoint will be A_SalesOrderItem as you want to filter for a specific product. I suggest you also check the API Documentation at Sales Order Item because it gives a detailed description about the fields. 

I'm not sure if a Build Apps application is the right tool here. Should the app be used interactive by your company employees or should it run scheduled in background?

Best Regards
Gregor

entry.title: iOS Build Failing
entry.content:
Hi, I was able to build an iOS project on Saturday but then later in the evening it's failing with 'Error Code 1'. I don't think I changed anything that would affect the build. I even tried to build a new project without changing the first page and only entering the iOS build configuration and that failed as well. Below  is the error it's giving. Can anyone shed some light on this?

 

AB version: 2.12.0
COMMAND: 

 npxrnv export -p ios -s standalone_adhoc -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @sapappgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.11.163 -r --xcodebuildArchiveArgs "OTHER_CODE_SIGN_FLAGS=\"--keychain\ AppGyver-77118\"" 

FAILED with ERROR: 

Command failed with exit code 1: npx rnv export -p ios -s standalone_adhoc -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @sapappgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.11.163 -r --xcodebuildArchiveArgs "OTHER_CODE_SIGN_FLAGS=\"--keychain\ AppGyver-77118\""

entry.title: Re: Email and Fiori launchpad Notifications in Purchase Order Flexible Workflow
entry.content: @RupeshKumar_04  thanks for sharing the above blog....

entry.title: Re: Inquiry on Linkage Between "Activate Advanced Valuation" and "Define Alternative
entry.content: Thanks for the question. It has been forwarded to the experts.

entry.title: Re: Transport logs shows as error but its a false error
entry.content: here is button "Change Display..." in the log overview. Can you uncheck the option "Full and chronological display" ?

entry.title: Re: Including Purchase Request in Search Customization
entry.content:
Dear @ahmad_alsaharty , 

Thank you for your question. 

Purchase Request is not covered by the enterprise search. 

You may submit improvement request here: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/887 , this will allow interested customers and partners to vote for it and help you promote this feature.

Regards,

Maya

entry.title: Re: S4HC Reference Purchasing Org
entry.content:
Dear Sahil,

We experience problems with the Reference Purchasing Organization in S4HC, exactly in the same way as ‘Chris/former_member706280’ describes.

We configured a Reference Purchasing Organization CENT and assigned it to all our ‘normal’ Purchasing Organizations 3710, 2810, 2910 and 1010.

As per the help reference mentioned by you (https://help.sap.com/saphelp_470/helpdata/en/0b/ecb237e29bc368e10000009b38f8cf/frameset.htm), we did not assign Reference Purchasing Organization CENT to any Plant nor Company code of 3710, 2810, 2910 or 1010: this because we want to create a central Purchase Contract (for Purchasing Organization CENT) for which all the 4 ‘normal’ Purchasing Organizations 3710, 2810, 2910 and 1010 should be able to create call-off Purchase Orders, using the prices of this central contract.

Mind you we also tried to assign Purchasing Organization CENT to all Company codes but this is not possible as we cannot create new entries in this configuration activity.

Also the assignment to the Plant (assign CENT to all Plants) configuration activity is not possible with new entries.

As per the help reference provide by you, we created a Supplier 1000030 for both Purchasing Organization 1010 and CENT.

Now when we try to create a Purchase Contract for CENT, the system prompts us to enter a Company Code:

We don’t want to create the Purchase Contract for a single Company Code: we want to create it for Purchasing Organization CENT and not enter a Plant (again as per the help reference you provided) in order for all ‘normal’ Company codes/Plants 3710, 2810, 2910 and 1010 to be able to call-off from this Purchase Contract.

How can this be solved so that it works exactly as it is described in the example of the help reference you provided?

Thanks in advance for your prompt reply.

Best regards, Bart

entry.title: Re: Transport logs shows as error but its a false error
entry.content: There it is.

entry.title: Fiori Reuse Library Application Log 'script load error'
entry.content:
Hi all, 

I have created a FIORI application with the Business Application Studio using the Freestyle Template. My intention was to integrate the Fiori Reuse Library to get the Application Log component. 

I used the SAP hel page Freestyle App Integration to do so.

When using the Terminal and executing 'npm run build' and afterwards 'npm run start-local' the application opens in a browser window. The problem here is, that the page is empty.

When I open the developer tools with F12, I get following error.

It says: 'ModuleError: failed to load 'sap/nw/core/applogs/lib/reuse/applogs/Component.js' from ../resources/sap/nw/core/applogs/lib/reuse/applogs/Component.js: script load error'

What did I wrong? I inserted every part mentioned in the help page.

Best Regards,
Martin

entry.title: Re: Let's get to know each other!
entry.content:
Hi Everyone!

I thought I would jump on this cool initiative as well. My name is J.D. Wong-Loera.
Process wise I come from the SAP Suppy Chain Planning background. All the way back from R/3 then ECC and APO to these days of S/4 HANA and IBP. But I have always been called "The Process Guy", for better or for worse 😅

I firmly believe that a strong process analysis practice coupled with BPM and Business Architecture capabilites can help tremendously an organization to not only cost-optimize but to design processes that are fun and engaging. 

I am relatively new to SAP Signavio. I have been using other applications in the last 10 years, but I've become a fan in the last year. Why? I think it is great that finally the SAP Application Landscape has its own Process Transformation Suite, and the fact that it is nicely aligning with SAP LeanIX, just makes these 2 a power couple seen form the Business Architecture and BPM angles.

Why I am in this community? to be inspired and to inspire others. Process Re-engineering as it was called in the 80s/90s and now with better terms as "Business Process Transformation" is not a walk in the park, because it is actually about continuous improvement, which means that BPM practitioners are always investigating and pressing some buttons in some business areas, and that requires focus and a tough skin sometimes. So inspiring one another is key in keeping the eyes on the prize.

My latest fondest moment is when I watched the release webinar for Process Transformation Manager, and I saw one the slides introducing the Role "Transformation Manager" and 4 key deliverables.  I believe that this will empower BPM enthusiasts in organizations, a formal role name such as this,  and the clarity of the deliverables will Lift them up so they can better leverage applications designed to analyse and manage the business processes. 

Cheers! and lets keep the learning and sharing going!
Best! 🙌

/JD

entry.title: Re: Company code - factory calendar
entry.content: Thanks

entry.title: Performance Management reports in Content Store
entry.content:
I don't see any reports in the Content Store for Performance Management, Goal Management, Development Planning, Succession Planning, etc. The only reports I see in the Content Store currently are mostly EC, Payroll and Time Management.

Are these reports available or are there any plans to add these reports to the Content Store in the future?

entry.title: Permission for each facet
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

i need the following report: 

Contact Origin | Contact ID | E-Mail of this origin | Permission of this e-mail

The problem is that I only get the e-mail and permission from the best record and not the e-mail and permission from the origin.

Does anybody have a solution for this?

Kind Regards

Katharina

entry.title: How to read/bind standard field in C4C to custom business object?
entry.content:
Hello,

I created a new custom business object and embedded component.

Now I want get the Business Partner ID, but I can only read it in the section group and not in the AdvancedListPane. Also I can not access the field in absl (EC_BusinessPartnerID_IN) because it is a structure field (read from inport). 

Has anybody an idea?

KR

entry.title: Re: Work center not allowed for plant maintenance
entry.content:
i have also problem when creating work order for maintenance at that time showing error you are not eligible but i also selected 005- plant maintenance and capacity catagoury 002

please guide how i can solve error

entry.title: Re: Transport logs shows as error but its a false error
entry.content: With "Full and chronological display" only ADJACENT steps with identical type are grouped for having a "last-one-wins" return code (this likely leaves room for a bug-or-feature discussion)

entry.title: Re: Automatic Hire
entry.content:
Hi @Crystal, could you help us with answer the below questions related to the behavior of automatic hire in onboarding 2.0.

1) How does the automatic hire run on candidates in MPH?
2) How many retries will be performed on a candidate in MPH. If so on what interval the retries happens?
Note: We observed - When a candidate appears in MPH, I see an icon that represents Automatic Hiring, and also another icon (alert icon) next to it which indicates that “there are errors while automatic hiring, please do manual hiring”. However, I see the candidate is automatically hired in next few minutes.
3) What happens when an error occurs during automatic hiring of a candidate in MPH?

Please Note: Today with our ONB 1.0 solution in place, we have developed a BOT that basically processes the candidates in MPH (Candidates coming from ONB to MPH page). This is an automated way of hiring candidates in MPH without manual intervention. In case BOT encounters any errors while processing hiring the candidates, the candidates will be sent back to MPH page and a report log is generated by BOT with the errors.
We are evaluating the benefit of enabling ‘Automatic Hire’ feature in our ONB 2.0 system to see if this can replace the current BOT we have in place.

@Crystal , @smitajalit , @Gopinath could you please share your insights on the above query. Based on this we have to evaluate the scope for BOT processing.

Appreciate your support.

Thanks,

D Harish Reddy

entry.title: S/4 Product Compliance - NEW Dangerous Goods Management, compliance requirements
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am exploring the Dangerous Goods Management solution in more detail to see if it will be a good fit my customer and I have a few technical questions. This will be based on S4HANA 2023 on premise. I would appreciate this greatly if anyone can answer these and forgive me if they are obvious questions:

  • On S4HANA 2023, will the regulatory content be updated regularly, and how often would it be updated? I see in the articles and material that the regulatory updates would be done, but not sure if it is exclusive to the S4HANA Cloud? Please tell me how it works
  • What is the process of creating your own compliance requirement if the regulatory SAP-enabled compliance requirements are not sufficient? I understand that only “text-based” compliance requirements are allowed. Can this be configured so that it can determine the correct labels and placards and UN numbers? If it cannot be determined automatically, can labels/markings be manually assigned?
  • For SAP-enabled regulatory compliance requirements, I understand that labels can be determined automatically. If hypothetically a label is missing from the compliance requirement, can we add a new manually label? And if so, what is the process?

If anyone has insights to the above then that would be great. 

Thanks

Shashi

entry.title: Re: Fiori Reuse Library Application Log 'script load error'
entry.content:
Hi Martin,

as the requested path /sap/nw suggests the Fiori Reuse Library is not part of the SAPUI5 Version hosted in the CDN but only delivered with SAP NetWeaver ABAP. So you would need to define a destination to an on premise ABAP System to make use of it. What is your plan for the deployment of the app? Cloud or on Premise?

Best Regards
Gregor

entry.title: Re: Deadline Monitoring with E-mail Notification in PO Flexible Workflow
entry.content:
Hii Abhishek,

    I'm already did the same but the deadline mail was not trigger and also the table which stores the work item id empty 'SWW_WIREGISTER' .

entry.title: Re: Code completion not working in Eclipse for CDS Built-...
entry.content: Hi Ehsan_Ghasemi. Good day. After updating ADT in Eclipse, the subject issue got resolved. Thanks for your time. Much appreciated!

entry.title: Re: Fiori Reuse Library Application Log 'script load error'
entry.content:
Hi Gregor,
thanks for your prompt answer.

My intention was to deploy the app on a a cloud system. I am checking the possibility to use application logs on the BTP.

Best Regards,
Martin

entry.title: Error: We couldn’t publish the event
entry.content:
Hi Team

We are getting the above error telling us we need to add content. 

The issue seems to be that we have not added any items. 

This was fully tested in our test environment prior to moving to production after the 2408 release. 

We do not use the item tab but have documentation added to the question section that supplier complete and return. this is how we have always used it. 

Is this a new setting we can disable?

entry.title: Unable to create event based triggers since update
entry.content:
Hello Builders,

I am wondering if anyone else has been experiencing issues when trying to create event-based triggers in BPA? Since the update that added "Timer" and "Joule" triggers to process I have no longer been able to create any event based triggers. When I select the event-based trigger option I only get an empty subprocess tab rather than the actual event-trigger editor.

Thank you,

entry.title: Re: Help Needed: Updating Target API Level to 34 for Google Play Compliance
entry.content: Hello! it seems that the issue is fixed, I have uploaded a new bundle and the target SDK is 34.

entry.title: Re: Fiori Reuse Library Application Log 'script load error'
entry.content: Maybe you provide further details on your usecase so the correct solution can be suggested.

entry.title: How to retrieve daily work calendar from EC Timesheet through API?
entry.content:
Hi there,

We are pretty new to Time Valuations, still very much learning. We have a scenario where we need to export (using API through SAP Cloud integration) the daily hours per employee based on their Work Schedule, i.e. the Planned Time section of the Timesheet:

e.g. Mon 02 Sept - 7.75 hours
Tue 03 Sept - 7.75 hours
Wed 04 Sept - 7.75 hours
Thu 05 Sept - 7.75 hours
Fri 06 Sept - 7.5 hours
Sat 07 Sept - 0 hours
Sun 08 Sept - 0 hours
Mon 09 Sept - 7.75 hours
etc. (from the Work Schedule)

These employees are not clocking in or recording time through the Timesheet - we simply need to export their daily working hours for each month.

We've tried setting up a Time Valuation to read a Time Type Group with Time Category = Scheduled Working Time, and the weekly hours appear on the "Summary" section of the Timesheet (see attached: "A"),

We then tried feeding the results of that Time Valuation to another Time Valuation, to see if that made a difference, and that also appears on the Timesheet ("B" above)...

...but the data (daily or weekly) is NOT then available through the employeeTime OData API entity. It seems that the Time Type Groups that hold the results of the Time Valuations are not available through employeeTime.

Can someone please advise how we can retrieve the employee's daily work calendar, as defined by the Work Schedule and as displayed on the Timesheet, through API?

(For info, we have another set of employees who DO clock in and out, and we are able to obtain their recorded working hours through the employeeTime entity.)

Many thanks,
Alan

entry.title: Re: Adding / changing printer for Manage Physical Invento...
entry.content: Thanks @Vijayendra

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano,

I’m Mustafa, a beginner SAP FICO consultant from Egypt. I’m excited to join the digital skills initiative as I am eager to deepen my knowledge and contribute to my community.

I am looking for switching my career mid-life, this certification will be a significant boost for my career and local businesses. I’m committed to continuous learning and making a positive impact with SAP solutions.

Thank you for this opportunity.

Best regards,
Mustafa Samir

entry.title: Can we overwrite the changes in existing FSV?
entry.content:
I created a new hierarchy (FSV) based on an existing one. After modifying the new FSV, I attempted to copy those changes back to the original using the "Copy To" menu. However, I encountered an error message stating "Hierarchy ID already exists." While I understand that accounts can be manually added to the existing FSV, I'm wondering if it's possible to overwrite the existing FSV entirely with the new one?

 

#FSV

#SAP HANA

entry.title: Re: Highlighting New Content in the Trainer's Tree Structure
entry.content: There's no built-in way to do this. One option would be to have a 'what's new' panel in the Description / on the library Autostart page for the entry-point group.

entry.title: Numeric Point
entry.content:
Hi all

This is all on BW Live connection!

I want to show a numeric widget with 2 different measures. One being the Sales amount and the other being the Stock amount

This will in BW come from 2 very different sources and thereby be 2 different queries.

Now I want to show these 2 keyfigures in the same numeric point widget - how?

I can combine the 2 queries on company code and fiscalper f.ex

BR

Nick

entry.title: Re: Creating A Simple Mobile Attendance Application With Local Storage
entry.content:
Hi Sankara1

Thanks for your email.

I'm still not sure about how to connect the logic to make to the Send, Edit, Add and Delete buttons work.

Would be appreciated if you or anyone can help or advice.

Thanks and regards.

entry.title: HU-Management in WM - requirements in MD04
entry.content:
Hello,

We are setting up Handling Unit Management in WM. Picking will be done in a HU storage location for a production order or network. When creating the delivery with delivery type HOD, this creates an additional requirement in MD04 in addition to the order reservation. This means that I have double requirements.

The requirement for the delivery should be offset against the requirement for the order reservation (AR-RES). It should be seen in MD04 that a delivery has been triggered for the material.

Is this possible? Does anyone know the relevant customizing settings for this?

I would be grateful for any advice.

Frederik

entry.title: Re: B1iF - Update UDF's not working
entry.content: I have found the solution. You need to handover all lines of the target document. The document, which I want to update has six lines. In my payload two lines where missing (it starts with linenum 2). After adding all lines it works.

entry.title: Re: Fiori Reuse Library Application Log 'script load error'
entry.content: I have developed a cloud application on the Business Technology Platform. I want to write and read logs from there (like I am doing on the on premise system using the /scwm/log object for writing logs and the transaction SLG1 for reading them ).

entry.title: Service order Internal order and sales order internal order are not in sync
entry.content:
Hi , I have a situation , 

We have a specific service order , which is released and upon release it created sales order and in sales order per lineitem we can see the internal orders (7) internal orders. 

But in Service order Transaction history , I can only see sales order no and last internal order no . 

rest 6 is missning , I tried with CRM_ORDER_READ and check docflow same result . 

now , If we copy that specific serv order and create new and release in that scenario no issue happens . all 7 internal orders from sales order reflecting . 

But my customer wish to fix the faulty service order and show the internal orders there . 

How to fix or check this scenario , cause when I try to create new one alll good . 

Is there any Sync program or something via which we can sync the transaction history ?

entry.title: Fund Center Master data and hierarchy in Group Reporting
entry.content:
Hi

Currently Fund Center master data is not provided as master data field in consolidation  Group Reporting  object.

Can someone advise on how to add custom master data field in Group Reporting.

Thanks

Vinay

entry.title: Re: Sales Order and SAP BTP Use Case with SAP Build Apps,...
entry.content:
Hi gregor, 

thanks for the quick response and your help. 

I checked in the API documentation and I think I would also need the  API_SALES_SCHEDULING_AGREEMENT with the delivery schedule entrypoint. 

Regarding SAP Build App, I’m using it to improve my BTP skills. There might be a different way to achieve this, which is why I made this post. To get advice, tips or knowledge about it.  I’ve already connected the Sales Order API to the app. I’m using this app for now for the sake of learning.

Regards,

Tom

entry.title: Service notification Configure
entry.content:
Hi All,

I need assistance. we created a new notification type and did the configure. Its working fine. However when a business user changes something on the newly created notification type, like on message address of the notification (IW52), it changes the BP master data. The old notification types dont change the master data when we change the notification details. What have we done wrong?

entry.title: Re: Error when trying to create a scheduled publication i...
entry.content: Hi William, the link contains permission related issue but in my case, the user was earlier able to schedule publications from the same story but now the error pops up.

entry.title: Re: Error when trying to create a scheduled publication in SAC
entry.content: The user could refresh the story but cannot create a schedule, gets the above error

entry.title: SM30 - Screen Refresh of data added via TMG
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a scenario where in one of the customising, i.e., maintained via SM30, the screen is not getting refreshed after the data is saved to the table in the DB. 

Scenario:

The table stores information about the active/inactive details of an attribute for a specified validity. For example, material active/inactive in a given period. The requirement here is that when a user enters information about a material which is already present in the DB with a specific validity, say date 1 to date 2. Then a custom event is written which checks the validity of the newly entered entry, in this case same material but with overlapping validity, say date 4 and date 5. In this case the delimitation should happen automatically and if needed new record should be created. This can arise in a situation where the dates are in the following order date 1 < date 4 < date 5 < date 2. In such situation there would be 3 records formed by updating new record, creating the entered record and the additional new record. For example. Record 1 with validity date 1 to ( date 4 - 1), Record 2 with validity date 4 to date 5, and Record 3 with validity from ( date 5 + 1 ) to date 2. So the new record is generated but is not displayed on the maintenance screen unless the maintenance view is re-opened.

Expectation:

Once the date is saved to the DB the maintenance screen should also show the additional record created.

Example:

  • Existing Record in DB
    MaterialActiveValid From Valid To
    M12345X01.01.202031.12.9999
  • New Record from Customising
    MaterialActiveValid From Valid To
    M12345-01.01.202431.12.2024
  • Expected Records in the customising
    MaterialActiveValid From Valid To 
    M12345X01.01.202031.12.2023(existing)
    M12345 01.01.202431.12.2024(user input)
    M12345X01.01.202531.12.9999(generated)
  • Records displayed after the trigger of the event
    MaterialActiveValid FromValid To 
    M12345X01.01.202031.12.2023(existing & updated)
    M12345 01.01.202431.12.2024(user input)

As mentioned, the user can only see the generated data once the maintenance screen is re-loaded.

Technical Information:

  • Created a customising database table with the following information ( material (key), active indicator (key), valid from (key), and valid to.
  • Created a maintenance view on top of the database table and created a TMG on it.
  • Created a custom event for the TMG with event type as 01.

It would be great if someone can provide some working clue on how to achieve the refresh of the TMG screen when a new record is created programatically.

ABAP Extensibility SAP NetWeaver Application Server for ABAP

entry.title: Re: Any help on why I get an error when running OA_UPLOAD...
entry.content: Hello, I had the same problem. If you uncheck "Processing on Front End", this error is fixed. That's how I solved it. I hope it helps.

My name is Ahmed Rajpoot.

I am an MBA student and trainee SAP Consultant from Pakistan. I have successfully completed the SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Implementation and have emailed the proof screenshot as required. I am now waiting for the redemption token.

entry.title: Guided Sourcing RFP - Item Need quotes
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are trying to setup guided sourcing RFP template and don't want the Item/lot to be mandatory while publishing the event. 

As per note KB0395605 I have set the bidding rule option 'Must participants improve their bids' to No. But still while publishing the event system prompts to enter items/lots.

Is there another setting that we need to check.

We were able to do this in RFP sourcing template but not working

Any input is appreciated

entry.title: Re: Task 4 - Implement Criticality feature and create an Object page
entry.content: Done!

entry.title: Re: Read/validate xml namespace using groovy script in SA...
entry.content:
@Bhaven you can use the following XSLT to get the distinct namespaces.

<xsl:stylesheet version="3.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" xmlns:sapci="http://sap.com/it/" exclude-result-prefixes="sapci">
<xsl:param name="exchange"/>
<xsl:template match="/">
<message>
<xsl:value-of select="distinct-values(//namespace::*)"/>
</message>
</xsl:template>
</xsl:stylesheet>

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

entry.title: OPS6/7: Text derieved from field PRPS-VERNR and PRPS-ASTNR is not changing
entry.content:
Hello,
we renamed some entries in OPS6 and OPS7.

But in CJ03 and CJ20n the old texts still appear.

After doing a mass change in all projects in these fields and going back, the texts are refreshing. 
So its working.

Is there a standard solution to refresh the texts without triggering the field directly after changing?

Thanks,
Christian

entry.title: Re: E-Mail Templates in S/4 HANA
entry.content:
Hi all,

has anybody found the way how to use a CDS View with parameters with email templates? I haven't.

Frankly, I don't think it is possible because CL_SMTG_EMAIL_TEMPLATE->SELECT simply does not take this option into account, data are selected from CDS purely by means of ty_gs_data_key.

It looks like I need to redefine the CDS view not to use the parameters.

Thanks,

Denis

entry.title: Re: Update your Public Cloud Expertise - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Product Expert Training HY2 2024
entry.content:
Hello,

Can you please paste link to register for this webinar in comments?

I am getting error after clicking all links from blog.

entry.title: Re: Transfer Stock - In-Plant
entry.content:
Dear Wenny,

Good day!

As per what you are requesting, to handle stock transfers using the ‘Transfer Stock - In-Plant’ app, I would recommend using the API ‘API_MATERIAL_DOCUMENT_SRV’. This API is used to post goods movements in Inventory Management.

In terms of the communication scenario, select ‘SAP_COM_0104 - Material Document Integration’. This communication scenario enables the integration of material documents, which are used to record changes in material stock.

API_MATERIAL_DOCUMENT_SRV - API Documentation

Best regards,

Geovana

entry.title: Test question
entry.content:
Hello.

This is a testing question, please ignore, it is my first time using using the plataform and I am just testing the waters before I jump in.

entry.title: Mostrar páginas en S/4HANA Cloud Public
entry.content:
hola

Cuando he intentado habilitar como trial el producto S/4HANA Cloud Public no me aparecían las páginas ni los espacios.

Pensé que era un problema de permisos o roles.

Pero la solución es habilitar los intereses en el DashBoard de tu usuario.

muchas gracias

entry.title: Re: Update your Public Cloud Expertise - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Product Expert Training HY2 2024
entry.content:
Hi,

From the screenshot I can see that you aren't logged-in yet - please log in via the icon on the top right corner and you will be able to access all webinars,

entry.title: No sale pages en el home de S4hana cloud public edition
entry.content:
Hola.

Si no te aparecen las en pages en S/4hana cloud public edition, la solución es habilitar los intereses, para que te aparezcan en el home.

entry.title: mostrar paginas en S/4HANA Cloud Public
entry.content: Cuando he intentado habilitar como trial el producto S/4HANA Cloud Public no me ha dejado insertar las paginas. Pensé que es un problema de permisos o roles , pero era un problema de elegir los intereses.

entry.title: SAP APO MIGRATE
entry.content:
Olá, estamos carregando dados no sistema S4HANA. Não conseguimos identificar nenhuma solução BAPI/iDOC/RDM ou Migration Cockpit para os objetos APO abaixo. Não queremos usar a gravação LSMW.

Alguém sabe qual iDOC/BAPI pode ser usado para carregar esses objetos em massa? Códigos de transação são escritos ao lado do objeto.

  1. Produto Master /SAPAPO/MAT1 - Dados Mestre -> Produto
  2. Faixa de Transporte /SAPAPO/SCC_TL1 - Faixas de Transporte
  3. Calendários /SAPAPO/CALENDAR – Calendário. Vejo LOICAL01 iDOC para isso, mas queria confirmar.

entry.title: mostrar páginas en s/4hana cloud public
entry.content: Cuando he intentado habilitar las paginas y espacios en S/4HANA no me ha dejado, pensaba que era un error de roles, pero he comprobado que era un tema de permisos, tienes que realizar primero los permisos para que te aparezcan las paginas.

entry.title: Re: What’s New for SAP Integration Suite – August 2024
entry.content:
@saplearner93 at the moment not. But this is part of the roadmap with the following item: Flexible configuration of agreement matching using custom keys 

Kind Regards,

Marco

entry.title: Re: mostrar páginas en s/4hana cloud public
entry.content: genial. para quienes estamos comenzando con sap es de gran ayuda tu apreciación.
